title: Beast Wars Neo
synopsis: Big Convoy, a powerful but solitary Maximal warrior, is assigned to train a team of young cadets while competing against the Predacon general Magmatron to collect Angolmois Capsules scattered across the galaxy. A mysterious third faction, the Blentrons, serves the cosmic devil Unicron.

episodes.title: Move Out, Big Convoy!
episodes.synopsis: The lone warrior Big Convoy is reluctantly assigned to command a crew of Maximal cadets aboard the training ship Gung Ho, and they receive their first mission to recover Angolmois Capsules.

episodes.title: Chase the Mysterious Capsule!
episodes.synopsis: Big Convoy's team encounters their first Angolmois Capsule on a remote planet and must compete with the Predacons to retrieve it.

episodes.title: Burning Heart Below Freezing
episodes.synopsis: On a frozen planet, the cadets face extreme cold and a Predacon assault. Their determination and teamwork are tested under harsh conditions.

episodes.title: Hang in There, Stampy
episodes.synopsis: The timid cadet Stampy must overcome his cowardly nature when he becomes separated from the group and faces danger alone.

episodes.title: Mirage in the Sand
episodes.synopsis: On a desert planet, the team encounters mysterious mirages that lead them into a Predacon trap while searching for an Angolmois Capsule.

episodes.title: Dinosaur Combiner Magmatron
episodes.synopsis: The Predacon commander Magmatron reveals his terrifying ability to split into three separate dinosaur forms, overwhelming the Maximals with his power.

episodes.title: Duel in the Labyrinth
episodes.synopsis: Big Convoy and a Predacon warrior face off inside a dangerous labyrinth, where the twisting corridors become as deadly as the enemy.

episodes.title: The Black Hole Crisis
episodes.synopsis: The Gung Ho is caught near a black hole's gravitational pull, and the crew must work together to escape before being dragged in.

episodes.title: Sub-Commander Longrack
episodes.synopsis: Longrack steps up as acting commander when Big Convoy is incapacitated, proving his worth as a leader despite his by-the-book personality.

episodes.title: Waa! They Got Eaten!
episodes.synopsis: The cadets are swallowed by a massive creature on a strange planet and must find a way to escape from inside the beast.

episodes.title: Planet of Time
episodes.synopsis: The team lands on a planet where time flows differently, causing bizarre aging and de-aging effects on the crew during their capsule search.

episodes.title: Lonely Hydra
episodes.synopsis: The Predacon Hydra struggles with isolation and his role within Magmatron's forces, revealing a more sympathetic side to the enemy ranks.

episodes.title: Break Is a Predacon?
episodes.synopsis: Suspicion falls on the cadet Break when evidence suggests he may be a Predacon spy, testing the team's trust and unity.

episodes.title: Ship's Log
episodes.synopsis: A clip show episode reviewing the crew's adventures so far through the Gung Ho's ship log records.

episodes.title: Mach Kick Enlists!?
episodes.synopsis: The wild horse Transformer Mach Kick joins the Maximal crew, bringing a headstrong and independent attitude that clashes with Big Convoy's command style.

episodes.title: Planet of the Ultimate Weapon
episodes.synopsis: The crew discovers a planet housing a devastating ancient weapon. Both factions race to claim or destroy it before the other can use it.

episodes.title: Troubled DNAVI
episodes.synopsis: The ship's AI navigator DNAVI malfunctions, causing chaos aboard the Gung Ho as the crew struggles to regain control of their vessel.

episodes.title: Attack! Randy
episodes.synopsis: The energetic cadet Randy charges headlong into a dangerous situation, and his recklessness forces Big Convoy to mount a risky rescue mission.

episodes.title: Bump the Physicist
episodes.synopsis: The scientifically-minded Bump uses his knowledge of physics to devise a clever solution to a seemingly impossible battlefield challenge.

episodes.title: Hardhead Is Hardheaded
episodes.synopsis: The stubborn Predacon Hardhead refuses to retreat from a losing battle, and his obstinance leads to an unexpected outcome for both sides.

episodes.title: Deep-Sea Personal Combat!!
episodes.synopsis: A one-on-one underwater duel erupts between a Maximal and Predacon warrior on an oceanic planet, testing their combat skills in an unfamiliar environment.

episodes.title: The Stolen Gung Ho
episodes.synopsis: The Predacons manage to capture the Maximal ship Gung Ho, leaving the crew stranded and forced to devise a plan to reclaim their vessel.

episodes.title: Survive the Hot-Blooded Instructor
episodes.synopsis: A veteran Maximal warrior puts the cadets through an intense training regimen that pushes them beyond their limits.

episodes.title: Assemble, New Warriors!
episodes.synopsis: A clip show episode that introduces new warriors joining the conflict and recaps the growing roster of combatants in the Angolmois capsule hunt.

episodes.title: The Mysterious Beast Warriors!?
episodes.synopsis: The mysterious Blentrons — Elphaorpha, Drancron, and Rartorata — make their first appearance, attacking both Maximals and Predacons as agents of a hidden master.

episodes.title: The Stolen Capsules
episodes.synopsis: The Blentrons steal collected Angolmois Capsules from both factions, revealing they serve a greater and more terrifying purpose.

episodes.title: Pursue the Blentrons!
episodes.synopsis: The Maximals and Predacons temporarily set aside their differences to track down the Blentrons and recover the stolen Angolmois Capsules.

episodes.title: Angry Magmatron
episodes.synopsis: Magmatron is enraged by the Blentrons' interference and launches a furious assault, caught between fighting the Maximals and the mysterious third faction.

episodes.title: Illusion? Lio Convoy
episodes.synopsis: An apparition of the legendary Lio Convoy appears to Big Convoy, delivering a cryptic warning about the true threat behind the Angolmois Energy.

episodes.title: Unicron Revived!?
episodes.synopsis: The Blentrons' master is revealed to be Unicron, the planet-eating cosmic horror, who is being resurrected through the collected Angolmois Energy.

episodes.title: Unicron's Ambition
episodes.synopsis: With Unicron's resurrection underway, the full scope of the cosmic devil's plan becomes clear — he intends to consume Cybertron itself.

episodes.title: Fight! Maximals
episodes.synopsis: The Maximals rally for a desperate battle against Unicron's forces, with Big Convoy leading his now-seasoned cadets into their greatest challenge.

episodes.title: End of the Maximals!?
episodes.synopsis: The Maximals face apparent annihilation as Unicron's power overwhelms them. All seems lost as the team is pushed to the breaking point.

episodes.title: The Final Battle
episodes.synopsis: Big Convoy leads the combined Maximal and Predacon forces in a final stand against Unicron, putting everything on the line to save the universe.

episodes.title: Graduation Ceremony!!
episodes.synopsis: With Unicron defeated, the cadets have their graduation ceremony. Big Convoy reflects on how his students have grown into true warriors, and they part ways with pride.

facts: Beast Wars Neo was produced as a direct sequel to Beast Wars II, airing on TV Tokyo from February to September 1999.
Like Beast Wars II, it used traditional 2D animation rather than the CGI style of the North American Beast Wars series.
The series was designed to promote a new line of Beast Wars toys in Japan, with most characters being original designs exclusive to the Japanese market.
The Angolmois Capsules that drive the plot are the scattered remains of the Angolmois Energy from Beast Wars II's finale.
The Blentrons serve as agents of Unicron, whose attempted resurrection forms the climax of the series and connects the Japanese Beast Wars timeline to the larger Transformers mythology.
Break's voice actor, Junko Takeuchi, would later become world-famous as the voice of Naruto Uzumaki.
